channel.title: Projects on Nikita Stepochkin
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Nikita Stepochkin

item.title: TV Show Recommendations Pipeline
item.description: Pipeline for constant provision of TV show recommendations based on the flow of user ratings

item.title: Plotly JSON Visualizer
item.description: Online visualizer of Plotly.js graphs in Plotly JSON visualization schema format

item.title: condition-spec
item.description: Collection of value objects that can be used for search in abstract data source

item.title: Gitplag
item.description: System for analyzing the similarity of programming code in solutions to programming tasks stored in Git repositories
